field_values.action_summary: Dorothy, Toto, Scarecrow, Tin Woodman, and Cowardly Lion arrive at the gates of the Emerald City. They are overwhelmed by the green marble streets and emerald-studded architecture before being led toward the Palace of Oz.
field_values.camera_intent: Wide establishing shots of the city; Medium tracking shots of the group walking; Close-ups of character reactions to green splendor
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Specific shade and intensity of green lighting/filters
Group formation density while navigating through crowds
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH011_SC001

## Production Intent
Establish the overwhelming scale and monochromatic green splendor of the Emerald City to transition characters from travelers to awe-struck visitors. The visual language must emphasize the contrast between the weary, multi-colored group and the uniform emerald architecture and citizens.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- toto
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- guardian_of_the_gates
- palace_soldiers

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_streets (Green Marble/Emerald)
- emerald_city_gates
- Palace_of_Oz

## Continuity Constraints
- Specific shade and intensity of "green" lighting/filters.
- The group's formation while walking through crowds.

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the gates (Curiosity/Awe)
- BT002: Entering the green splendor (Transition to Wonder)
- BT003: Navigating the city toward the Palace (Overwhelmed Wonder)
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
